name: Scoreboard Live
description: A live match scoreboard with team logos, real-time score, game timer, event ticker, momentum streak indicator, and viewer count for broadcast surfaces.

compact.description: Slim top-bar scoreboard strip showing only logos, scores, and timer for embedding in streaming overlays or persistent site headers

detail.description: Full scoreboard panel with logos, large scores, timer, streak indicators, rolling event ticker, and live viewer counter in one cohesive block

broadcast.description: Widescreen broadcast overlay format with oversized team sections, center timer, and ticker optimized for 1920x1080 streaming compositions

visual_brief: A horizontal scoreboard bar dominated by two team sections flanking a center timer block. Left section: Team A logo (48-72px, team-branded background tint), team tricode below logo (e.g. 'FNC' in bold monospace), large team score in very large monospace (72px broadcast, 36px detail, 24px compact). Center block: game timer counting down or up in prominent monospace, above/below it the map or round indicator (e.g. 'MAP 2 - ASCENT' or 'ROUND 14'). Right section: mirrors left with Team B. A streak indicator (small fire icon with count or momentum arrow) appears under whichever team has a winning streak, glowing in their team color. Below the main bar, a horizontal auto-scrolling event ticker shows recent plays with icons and text ('16:42 Aspas ACE' 'Derke 3K' 'Plant B'). Top-right corner has viewer count pill with live red dot and count in monospace (e.g. '142K viewers'). Team colors provide accent trim. Live indicator (pulsing red dot + 'LIVE' text) near viewer count.

layout_hints.note: Timer must be prominent monospace, center-aligned. Team tricodes always visible as text, never logo-only.
layout_hints.live_indicator: Live state uses text 'LIVE' with pulsing dot, never just color. Viewer count formatted with K/M suffixes.

slots.team-logo: Team emblem with tricode label beneath. Appears twice mirrored on left and right.
slots.team-score: Large monospace score number, sized per preset (largest in broadcast).
slots.game-timer: Center-block monospace timer with map/round label line above or below.
slots.event-ticker: Auto-scrolling horizontal strip of recent play events with timestamps and icons.
slots.streak-indicator: Small momentum badge appearing under the leading team showing consecutive round wins.
slots.viewer-count: Live pill with pulsing red dot, 'LIVE' text, and formatted viewer count.

keyboard: Tab: cycle through team sections and ticker

responsive.mobile: Broadcast preset falls back to compact. Ticker scroll speed reduced. Tricodes stay visible; logos shrink.
responsive.tablet: Detail preset retained with slightly smaller scores. Ticker single-line truncation.

micro.ticker-event-in: new event slide-in from right 300ms ease-out

transitions.map-change: full scoreboard fade-out and fade-in 500ms ease-in-out

ambient.live-dot-pulse: red dot opacity 0.4 to 1.0 1s ease-in-out infinite
ambient.streak-glow: streak indicator team-color glow pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite

composition.ScoreboardLive: Section(d-section) > [MainBar > [TeamSection(left) > [TeamLogo + TeamTricode + TeamScore(mono-xl) + StreakIndicator?] + CenterBlock > [MapLabel + GameTimer(mono-xl) + RoundLabel] + TeamSection(right) > [TeamScore(mono-xl) + TeamTricode + TeamLogo + StreakIndicator?]] + EventTicker(marquee) + ViewerCount(top-right, d-annotation) > [LiveDot + ViewerLabel(mono)]]
